        /// <summary>
        /// Executes the command against the connection and converts the results to <see cref="T:global::TestModels.AuditLog"/> objects.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dataQuery">The <see cref="T:FluentCommand.IDataQuery"/> for this extension method.</param>
        /// <returns>
        /// An <see cref="T:System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList`1" /> of <see cref="T:global::TestModels.AuditLog"/> objects.
        /// </returns>
        public static global::System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<global::TestModels.AuditLog> Query<TEntity>(
            this global::FluentCommand.IDataQuery dataQuery)
            where TEntity : global::TestModels.AuditLog
        {
            return dataQuery.Query<global::TestModels.AuditLog>(
                factory: AuditLogDataReaderExtensions.AuditLogFactory,
                commandBehavior: global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SequentialAccess |
                                 global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SingleResult);
        }

        /// <summary>

            return dataQuery.QuerySingle<global::TestModels.AuditLog>(

        /// <summary>
        /// A factory for creating <see cref="T:global::TestModels.AuditLog"/> objects from the current row in the specified <paramref name="dataRecord"/>.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dataRecord">The open <see cref="T:System.Data.IDataReader"/> to get the object from.</param>
        /// <returns>
        /// A instance of <see cref="global::TestModels.AuditLog"/>  having property names set that match the field names in the <paramref name="dataRecord"/>.
        /// </returns>
        public static global::TestModels.AuditLog AuditLogFactory(this global::System.Data.IDataReader dataRecord)
        {
            if (dataRecord == null)
                throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(dataRecord));

            int v_id = default!;
            string v_eventName = default!;
            global::System.DateTimeOffset v_created = default!;

            for (var __index = 0; __index < dataRecord.FieldCount; __index++)
            {
                if (dataRecord.IsDBNull(__index))
                     continue;

                var __name = dataRecord.GetName(__index);
                switch (__name)
                {
                    case "Id":
                        v_id = dataRecord.GetInt32(__index);
                        break;
                    case "event_name":
                        v_eventName = dataRecord.GetString(__index);
                        break;
                    case "Created":
                        v_created = dataRecord.GetDateTimeOffset(__index);
                        break;
                }
            }

            return new global::TestModels.AuditLog(
                Id:  v_id,
                EventName:  v_eventName,
                Created:  v_created
            );
        }

    }
